title: ItemBound: ReBound
description: Rename items to change their model/texture! Weapons, tools, food, & custom decorations/furniture!
body:
## Features

This resource pack is now primarily a collection of models to then apply to your items using Data Pack or Mod.
(Visit the wiki link on the right for model list)

## Dependency

This pack will not do anything without a Data Pack or Mod with which to apply item model definitions, I recommend & use [ModelApplier by Ewan Howell](https://modrinth.com/datapack/modelapplier).

## Compatibility

Version 26.1+ is fully compatible with any other resourcepack/mod you may have installed.

## For using versions "1.21.11+" & older

[Item Guide for older versions](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1U6MAyyB0GF4q0p7FjlPXoOm3l7cM4evckbuFH1_yp5A/edit?usp=sharing)

## Usage License
As long as proper credit is given, the contents of this pack can be used in any way.

## Credits

- Mojang for creating & updating Minecraft
- SixFootBlue/Blue Haven for starting [ItemBound](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/itembound-16x) and inspiring me to work with resource packs
- Teoxex's [Revamped Archery](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/re-archery/) as the base of all bows/crossbows in this pack
